description: Run a bounded GPU-backed experiment on a GPU worker with an explicit dataset, model-family, and training-note contract, including computer-vision and adjacent ML workloads.

required_inputs.name: dataset_uri
required_inputs.description: Resolved dataset location for the GPU experiment.

required_inputs.name: model_family
required_inputs.description: Named model family or architecture template to train or evaluate.

required_inputs.name: training_notes
required_inputs.description: Bounded notes describing the experimental goal, modality, and training constraints.

required_inputs.name: evaluation_target
required_inputs.description: Primary evaluation target or retrieval objective for the bounded GPU experiment.

required_inputs.name: validation_strategy
required_inputs.description: Declared split or validation policy used to guard against overfitting.

required_inputs.name: validation_split
required_inputs.description: Declared validation split fraction when the GPU workflow uses an internal validation partition.

runtime_requirements.purpose: bounded GPU experiment for computer-vision, neural-net, or adjacent ML workloads
